column1: Please run the searches below (just copy and paste them from here and put them in your Splunk search bar). Once they have completed you will need to export the results as a csv or text file. There is an icon just below the search bar to the right that allows you to do this.
Please let me know if you have any questions. hutch@splunk.com
Searches to run on search head.
Searches to run on licensing manager.

column2: stats sum(b) as b by _time, pool, s, st, h, idx
stats dc(host) AS Host_Count, count As Example_Count, p10(esize) AS ten_perc_bytes, avg(esize) AS avg_bytes, p90(esize) AS ninety_perc_bytes by sourcetype
eval Source_DataSet_Details=""Total Events Sampled ("".tostring(cntfc).""), Total Hosts Sampled ("".tostring(Host_Count)."")""

eval Average_Details=""Average event byte size ("".tostring(avg_bytes).""), Sum of Average bytes ("".tostring(est_t_bytes_avg).""), Estimated Daily MB using Average ("".tostring(est_t_mb_avg).""), Estimated Daily GB using Average ("".tostring(est_t_gb_avg)."")""

eval 90_Percent_Details=""90 percent event byte size ("".tostring(ninety_perc_bytes).""), Sum of 90 percent bytes ("".tostring(est_t_bytes_ninety).""), Estimated Daily MB using 90 percent ("".tostring(est_t_mb_ninety).""), Estimated Daily GB using 90 percent ("".tostring(est_t_gb_ninety)."")""
join sourcetype [search index=_internal source=*license_usage.log type=Usage st=*
stats sum(b) as sbytes by st
eval Actual_Indexed_Size=""Total MB Indexed ("".tostring(smb).""), Total GB Indexed ("".tostring(sgb)."")""
stats values(h) AS hostnames dc(h) AS host_count sum(b) AS host_volume by s date_mday
stats avg(source_volume_MB) AS avg_source_volume_MB values(hostnames) AS hostnames by s

column1: [ search index=_internal type=Usage source=""*license_usage.log"" (idx=*) h!=DATA h!=CHANGE (h!=""All_Hosts_Base"") (s!=""All_Sources_Base"")

column2: stats dc(h) AS host_count, sum(b) AS host_volume by s date_mday
stats avg(host_count) AS avg_host_count by s
table s avg_host_count hostnames avg_source_volume_MB avg_host_source_volume_MB

rename s AS Source, h AS Host, hostnames AS ""Host name(s)"", host_volume_avg_MB AS ""Host Volume Avg (MB)"", avg_host_count AS ""Avg Host Count"", avg_source_volume_MB AS ""Avg daily Source Volume (MB)"", avg_host_source_volume_MB AS ""Avg daily Source Volume by Host (MB)""
stats sum(b) AS b, dc(h) AS h by st date_wday
stats avg(b) as avg_b, avg(h) AS Host_Count_per_Day by st
table Sourcetype, Avg_MB_per_Day, Avg_GB_per_Day, Host_Count_per_Day, Avg_MB_per_Host
